annotations.grafana.app/message: Visual stuff for positive+negative and BPS graphs

spec.expr: zfs_used_bytes{instance="$instance", dataset=~"$dataset", dataset!~".*/.*"} / (zfs_used_bytes{instance="$instance", dataset=~"$dataset"} + zfs_available_bytes{instance="$instance", dataset=~"$dataset"})

spec.title: ARC size vs target vs max
ARC ghost hits
spec.description: High ghost hits mean data you just evicted is being requested again immediately. Your ARC is too small.
